name: Listening Overview
description: High-level listening activity and top artists.

questions.name: Listens Per Day
questions.native_query: SELECT DATE(l.started_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS listens FROM listen l WHERE l.started_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

questions.name: Top Artists (Last 30 Days)
questions.native_query: SELECT a.name AS artist, COUNT(*) AS listens FROM listen l JOIN track t ON t.spotify_id = l.track_id JOIN artist a ON a.spotify_id = t.artist_id WHERE l.started_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY a.name ORDER BY listens DESC LIMIT 15
